text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Everyone's been in shock after that<n>student
criticized us for "running<n>away" from the harsh
reality of<n>competition. Light Hello in particular<n>has
been taking it hard.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Concerned, I decide to check up on<n>her. She
wonders aloud whether<n>she's just compensating
for past<n>regret at never getting to sing in a
winning concert.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later, she apologizes in front of us,<n>saying that the
whole project was a<n>mistake. However, Mihono
Bourbon<n>isn't convinced.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon chimes in too. For her,<n>the Grand
Concert is exciting<n>because it presents a chance
to<n>convey her emotions.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There could be more to the Grand<n>Concert than
even we realize. We<n>decide to believe in that
potential.
